title: Senior DevOps Engineer
skills: Python, Gcp Devops,  Terraform,  Scripting, Cloud,  Python Workflows
match_reason: Strong technical and experience match for senior DevOps/infrastructure work (Terraform, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, Python, multi-cloud), but salary is far below target and the role is GCP-leaning with rotational shift, making it a decent but not ideal fit.

title: Infrastructure Engineer  6+ years Hyderabad/Chennai/Bangalore
skills: Infrastructure Engineer, Terraform, Platform Engineer, Kubernetes, Infrastructure Management
match_reason: Strong match on infrastructure/platform engineering, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, scripting, and 11 years’ experience; title and location fit well, but it lacks explicit Azure/AWS depth in the JD, salary is undisclosed, and the role is more GCP/RPA-focused than the candidate’s Azure/AWS multi-cloud preference.

title: Senior Cloud Site Reliability Engineer
skills: Site Reliability Engineering, Silos, Grafana, Azure Monitoring, SLOs, SRE, Prometheus, Reliability Engineering, Azure Cloud, Error Budgets, SLAs, Terr
match_reason: Strong match for senior Azure-focused SRE/DevOps with excellent overlap in Azure, Kubernetes, Terraform, Prometheus/Grafana, Python, and 11 years’ experience; title and level fit well, but AWS is not emphasized, salary is undisclosed, and hybrid Bengaluru is less preferred than remote.
